name: Chick Pea - Zucchini Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preferably use thin egg noodles or whole wheat spaghetti for the pasta.
2. For garnish: Slice green parts of scallions very thin lengthwise, drop into ice water; curls will form in about 15 minutes.
3. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil; cook pasta until al dente.
4. In a saucepan, heat safflower oil over medium heat. Add chopped onion and minced garlic, stirring occasionally until onions are translucent.
5. Add mushrooms and sliced zucchini, cooking until the vegetables are tender but not mushy (about 3-4 minutes).
6. Stir in the remaining ingredients: chickpeas, tomato paste, water, curry powder, and black pepper. Cook, uncovered, for about 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Drain pasta well.
8. Spoon vegetable mixture over the cooked pasta; garnish with scallion curls if desired.
Variations:
- Add 1-2 teaspoons finely minced gingerroot to the vegetables during sauteing.
